title: host-meta uses rel=lrd instead of rel=lrdd
description: discovery.rs line 165: the host-meta XML response uses rel="lrd" but RFC 6415 specifies rel="lrdd" (Link-based Resource Descriptor Discovery). Older fediverse implementations (GNUSocial, older Mastodon, Friendica) that rely on host-meta for WebFinger discovery will fail to resolve accounts because they look for the lrdd rel type specifically.
